item.title: Will This Track Finish Its Last Job?
item.description: Larson Farms puts a track to work on its last job and sees whether it can finish the task in the field.

media:content.media:title: Will This Track Finish Its Last Job?
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms puts a track to work on its last job and sees whether it can finish the task in the field.

item.title: Fixing Equipment During a Rain Delay
item.description: Larson Farms uses the rain delay to handle repairs and keep equipment ready for the next field day.

media:content.media:title: Fixing Equipment During a Rain Delay
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms uses the rain delay to handle repairs and keep equipment ready for the next field day.

item.title: Field Work Keeps Rolling at Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms keeps the work moving in the field, showing the steady pace of daily farm operations and equipment use.

media:content.media:title: Field Work Keeps Rolling at Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms keeps the work moving in the field, showing the steady pace of daily farm operations and equipment use.

item.title: More Breakdowns Again!
item.description: Larson Farms deals with another round of equipment breakdowns during the workday, keeping the operation moving with practical repairs and steady farm work.

media:content.media:title: More Breakdowns Again!
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms deals with another round of equipment breakdowns during the workday, keeping the operation moving with practical repairs and steady farm work.

item.title: Tractor Work With a Risk of Getting Stuck
item.description: Larson Farms works through field conditions with a tractor that could get stuck, showing the kind of careful farm work and equipment handling needed in the field.

media:content.media:title: Tractor Work With a Risk of Getting Stuck
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms works through field conditions with a tractor that could get stuck, showing the kind of careful farm work and equipment handling needed in the field.

item.title: Trying This Farm Project Again
item.description: Larson Farms gives this project another try, showing the kind of hands-on work and problem-solving that keeps farm jobs moving.

media:content.media:title: Trying This Farm Project Again
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms gives this project another try, showing the kind of hands-on work and problem-solving that keeps farm jobs moving.

item.title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
item.description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage and the work needed to keep equipment moving.

media:content.media:title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage and the work needed to keep equipment moving.

item.title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
item.description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage, with a look at the repair work and keeping equipment ready for the next job.

media:content.media:title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage, with a look at the repair work and keeping equipment ready for the next job.

item.title: Brody’s First Acre of the Year
item.description: Brody gets the first acre of the year underway in Episode 2, marking the start of another season of field work at Larson Farms.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s First Acre of the Year
media:content.media:description: Brody gets the first acre of the year underway in Episode 2, marking the start of another season of field work at Larson Farms.
